results.description: Buenos Ken's Rueda Club should stay a same-day weekly Sunday series with 4pm-6pm timing.

matcher.exactName: Ken's Rueda Club

doc.name: Ken's Rueda Club
doc.eventName: Ken's Rueda Club
doc.description: Sundays@ 4PM — Ken's Rueda Club. If you like line or square dancing, you'll love... It's salsa, for everyone. Ken's Rueda Club is for folks who don't want to be too serious, unless it's for serious fun! An easy-going group, where mistakes become part of the joy.
